label: Symphony Talent Employer Brand Comparative Audit Project

geography.notes: Assumed market scope for the local fixture; production intake should record the user's selected geography.

audience_use_case.use_case: Prove the artifact bundle can carry employer brand audit provenance without making this company set the workflow.
audience_use_case.notes: This is fixture provenance, not a client-ready strategic report.

export_preferences.notes: Metadata-only export entry; no export execution is part of this fixture.
Metadata-only export entry; no export execution is part of this fixture.

output_preferences.notes: Output preferences are descriptive only and do not run report generation or export jobs.

source_categories.label: Careers or jobs site
source_categories.evidence_goal: Capture the primary employer value proposition and talent promise.
source_categories.notes: The local fixture includes one careers-style HTML page per company.

source_categories.label: Employer brand, culture, mission, values, or benefits pages
source_categories.evidence_goal: Capture explicit EVP, culture, values, benefits, and employee promise messaging.
source_categories.notes: Not collected from live sites in this fixture.

source_categories.label: LinkedIn company, life, and jobs presence
source_categories.evidence_goal: Capture social proof, talent-facing positioning, and active hiring signals.
source_categories.notes: Not collected from live sites in this fixture.

source_categories.label: Review platforms
source_categories.evidence_goal: Capture employee sentiment, ratings, and recurring themes when available.
source_categories.notes: Review platforms are required by the workflow policy but unavailable in this static local fixture.

source_categories.label: Social or campaign examples
source_categories.evidence_goal: Capture recruiting campaign tone, proof points, and engagement examples.
source_categories.notes: Not collected from live sites in this fixture.

source_categories.label: Awards, rankings, or employer recognition
source_categories.evidence_goal: Capture reputation proof points and employer recognition.
source_categories.notes: Not collected from live sites in this fixture.

source_categories.label: Employee story or talent community examples
source_categories.evidence_goal: Capture lived-experience proof and candidate engagement examples.
source_categories.notes: Not collected from live sites in this fixture.
